name: Community First Bank
description_short: Community First Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank headquartered in New Iberia, Louisiana, offering checking, savings, lending, and digital banking services across six branch locations.
description_long:
Community First Bank is a regional FDIC-insured bank based in New Iberia, Louisiana, with a primary focus on serving the local community across Iberia, Acadia, and St. Martin parishes. The bank has expanded to six branch locations including New Iberia (main office and northside), Spanish Trail, Loreauville, Broussard, and Youngsville, demonstrating consistent regional growth. The bank emphasizes stability through federal deposit insurance and commitment to community banking principles.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of traditional banking products including checking accounts (notably their K.I.S.S. with Interest Checking product), savings accounts, credit and debit cards, and lending services. They provide modern digital banking conveniences including mobile banking apps for iPhone, iPad, and Android devices, online account access with registration capability, and live customer service support available Monday-Friday 8am-10pm and Saturday-Sunday 9am-10pm. Their physical branch network supports both lobby and drive-thru services with consistent operating hours across most locations.

Community First Bank distinguishes itself through localized customer service and regional focus rather than national scale. They promote fraud prevention education materials to customers and maintain FDIC insurance backing by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank has built its reputation on accessibility with multiple branch locations and extended customer support hours including weekend service. Their emphasis on simplicity (K.I.S.S. branding) suggests an approach focused on understandable, straightforward banking products.

As a regional community bank, Community First Bank serves customers seeking local banking relationships with traditional branch access and personal service. The website provides limited detail on specific product terms, rates, or comprehensive service offerings beyond product category names. Consumers should contact branches directly for detailed information on account features, lending terms, and competitive rate comparisons. The bank's strength lies in community accessibility rather than specialized financial services or cutting-edge fintech offerings. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: FDIC-insured checking accounts including K.I.S.S. with Interest Checking
Wire transfer and money handling (implied through bank services)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Six branch locations across Louisiana parishes with consistent physical access
Extended live customer service hours: weekdays 8am-10pm and weekends 9am-10pm
Mobile banking apps available for iPhone, iPad, and Android devices
Drive-thru services available at all locations, including Saturday access at main and Broussard branches
Proactive fraud prevention education materials provided to customers
K.I.S.S. with Interest Checking product designed for account simplicity
cons: Limited online information about specific product terms, rates, and fees—requires direct contact with branches
Regional bank with no national presence or ATM network partnerships mentioned
Website content sparse on lending products, credit card details, or investment services
Customer service phone line requires navigating options (extension 1 for support)
No mention of competitive advantages, special programs, or unique features beyond standard banking products

contact.address: 1101 E Admiral Doyle Dr, New Iberia, LA 70560

best_for: Louisiana residents in Iberia, Acadia, and St. Martin parishes seeking local branch banking relationships
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and traditional brick-and-mortar banking accessibility
Small business owners and individuals needing personal service from community-focused banking staff
diagnosis: Community First Bank is best for Louisiana residents within their six-branch service area who value local banking relationships, physical branch access, and FDIC insurance protection. The main caveat is that prospective customers must contact branches directly for specific product rates, terms, and features, as the website provides minimal detail on competitive offerings or specialized services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1101 E Admiral Doyle Dr, New Iberia, LA 70560
